texto: I've had my past lives read, my aura tuned, my chakras aligned, my spirit guides channeled, my palms interpreted, and my kundalini awakened.
explicacao: Citação de Sera J. Beak sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I've had my past lives read, my aura tuned, my chakras aligned, my spirit guides channeled, my pa…” articula reflexao, new-age, lives em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.

texto: See, sexuality is less about the actual act of having pretty good sex for seventeen minutes twice a week and much more about surrounding yourself with an ever simmering sensual energy, pulsing just underneath your daily life and infusing almost everything you do. It's like you're always just a little bit horny, just a little turned on, but the object of your gentle lust isn't just your lover, it's divine life itself.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Sera J. Beak: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “See, sexuality is less about the actual act of having pretty good sex for seventeen minutes twice…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que espiritualidade, divine-life, sexuality pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de sexuality.

texto: My sense of self has expanded and contracted like a schizophrenic accordion. I have questioned everything, and I have felt nothing. I have told the universe to f**k off, and I have fallen down weeping at its compassionate response.
